brief_summary: Two-column ledger. Left (coral solid, 'helps most'): budget top-mount boards, first mod before bigger investments, linears on hollow boards. Right (bordeaux dashed, 'doesn't help much'): gasket-mount boards, already-foamed boards, polycarbonate or acrylic cases. Each row carries the reason for its verdict.
data_sources: tape-mod.mdx § 'Where it helps most' — 'Budget top-mount boards ... Stock boards before a bigger mod investment ... Linear switch builds where hollow resonance is unmasked'
tape-mod.mdx § 'Where it doesn't help much' — 'Gasket-mount boards ... Boards with extensive existing foam ... Fully polycarbonate or acrylic cases'
